channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Trump vows to blockade Strait of Hormuz after Iran peace talks stumble
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- WSJ: Trump open to diplomacy despite Hormuz blockade move
- Trump Says US Navy To Blockade Strait Of Hormuz Following Failed Iran Deal
- After Trump’s blockade announcement, IRGC says will view military vessels approaching Hormuz as ceasefire breach
- After Trump’s Hormuz blockade order, IRGC says will view military vessels approaching strait as ceasefire breach
- Trump announces Strait of Hormuz naval blockade after failing to reach deal with Iran
- Trump orders navy to block Hormuz after talks fail
- Trump announces closure of Hormuz Strait as Iran talks falter
- Trump says US will blockade strait of Hormuz after Iran peace talks fail
- Trump orders blockade of Hormuz strait after Iran talks fail
- After Trump’s Hormuz blockade announcement, IRGC says will view military vessels approaching strait as ceasefire breach
- Trump's Strait of Hormuz blockade threat raises risks and leaves predicaments unchanged
- Trump orders naval blockade of Strait of Hormuz
- Trump orders US Navy to block Hormuz Strait after Iran talks fail
- Strait of Hormuz blockade explained: What Trump's new US Navy move means for ships, cargo and Iran
- Trump says US Navy will begin blockade of Strait of Hormuz 'effective immediately'
- Trump announces Strait of Hormuz blockade after US-Iran peace talks end
- Why will US Navy blockade 'already choked' Strait of Hormuz? Trump blockade order after failed US Iran news talks
- Strait of Hormuz blockade update: Trump threatens Iran with Gulf of Trump suggestion after ceasefire talks fail
- Trump Says U.S. Will Blockade Strait of Hormuz After Iran Peace Talks Fail
- Trump Orders US Naval Blockade Of Strait Of Hormuz
- James Bays on Trump blocking Strait of Hormuz
- Trump announces naval blockade of Strait of Hormuz as Iran peace talks fail
- Trump orders Strait of Hormuz blockade after US-Iran talks fail in Islamabad
- Trump says it will take a little while for US to blockade the Strait of Hormuz
- Trump orders US Navy to block Hormuz after Iran talks fail
- Iran war: Trump orders Strait of Hormuz naval blockade
- Urgent: Trump says Navy to blockade all ships trying to cross Hormuz Strait
- Flash: Trump says U.S. Navy to immediately blockade all ships attempting to enter or leave Hormuz Strait
- Trump warns of Hormuz blockade as US-Iran talks end without deal
- Trump orders US naval blockade of Strait of Hormuz
- 'LOCKED & LOADED!': Trump orders Hormuz naval blockade, says US will ‘finish up' Iran after no deal
- Trump makes major Strait of Hormuz announcement after failed peace talks, tears into Iran for ‘WORLD EXTORTION’
- Trump orders US naval blockade of Strait of Hormuz
- Trump says US to start blockading the Strait of Hormuz immediately
- Trump says US will 'blockade all ships entering or leaving Hormuz'
- Trump says U.S. to start blockading the Strait of Hormuz immediately
- ‘Blown to hell’: Trump announces US blockade of Strait of Hormuz
- Trump says US to start blockading the Strait of Hormuz immediately
- ‘No one who pays Iran…’: Donald Trump announces naval blockade of Strait of Hormuz after Islamabad talks fail
- Trump orders US naval blockade of Strait of Hormuz
- Trump Says US Naval Blockade in Strait of Hormuz Will Begin Shortly
- Trump announces Navy blockade in Strait of Hormuz after Iran talks fizzle
- US to Start Blockading the Strait of Hormuz, Trump Says
- Trump orders US naval blockade of Strait of Hormuz
- Trump threatens Strait of Hormuz blockade after talks fail
- 'Out-blockade Iran': Trump floats Hormuz naval blockade in post after Islamabad talks fail]]>

item.title: US-Iran peace talks end without a deal

- Inconclusive talks in Islamabad leave doubts about U.S.-Iran ceasefire
- Why US-Iran talks collapsed after marathon negotiations
- US-Iran talks fail as world urges respect for truce

- 'Netanyahu called Vance mid-talks': US-Iran deal collapses after Israel's last-minute intervention?
- Why U.S.-Iran talks collapsed after marathon negotiations
- Stalemate diplomacy: US-Iran talks fail as both sides resist major concessions - analysis

- US and Iran end ceasefire talks and Vance heads home without an agreement
- US-Iran talks failed to reach agreement: Vance
- US and Iran end 21-hour ceasefire talks without agreement before Vance departs Pakistan
- Failure of US-Iran talks is a blow to hopes of finding an off-ramp to crisis

- Watch JD Vance’s full remarks after US-Iran talks end without deal

- ‘Bad news’: Vance says no agreement reached after marathon talks with Iran
- US-Iran talks end without deal; Tehran rejects nuclear condition
- Vance says talks failed to reach agreement with Iran
- ‘We haven’t reached an agreement’: JD Vance says ‘bad news for Iran’ after ceasefire talks
- ‘Bad news for Iran’: JD Vance as Islamabad talks fall flat with ‘no deal’
